value.found_quote: **Custom proxy support**: advanced users can implement custom rules on outgoing traffic ... See [Security limitations](#security-limitations) for the implications of this design, and [Custom proxy configuration](#custom-proxy-configuration) if your threat model requires TLS inspection.
value.rationale: The page describes custom proxy support for outgoing traffic in Claude Code's sandbox, and explicitly references custom proxy configuration for threat models requiring TLS inspection. This substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers custom proxy support with TLS inspection for outgoing traffic.
